chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 101 of 2024 C. P. No. D – 102 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.424/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29.05.2024 Mr. Muhammad Yasir Kalhoro, Advocate for petitioner in both petitions. Mr. Ali Murad Malano, Advocate for respondent No.7 in C. P. No. D-101 of 2024. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- These petitions have been filed for quashment of FIRs (Crime No.02 of 2024 u/s 324, 353, 401, 398 PPC and Crime No.03 of 2024 u/s 24 of Sindh Arms Act, 2013, registered at Police Station Khambhra) on the ground that false cases have been registered against the petitioner. In the light of that ground, DIGP Sukkur was ordered to reinvestigate the matter through some senior officer not below the rank of DSP, posted in other district than Ghotki. In compliance, DSP Pano Aqil, District Sukkur was appointed as Investigating Officer, who, after a thorough inquiry / investigation has submitted the report prima facie upholding genuineness of the FIRs registered against the petitioner. It has also been pointed out that Challans have been submitted in the Court in such cases. Learned Counsel although has tried to argue the matters on merits, but since in the reinvestigation, the FIRs have been found prima facie genuine, no case for indulgence is made out. Learned Counsel also therefore seeks directions to the trial Court to decide the matters expeditiously. In view of above, both petitions are dismissed along with pending application(s), if any.

Learned Counsel also therefore seeks directions to the trial Court to decide the matters expeditiously. In view of above, both petitions are dismissed along with pending application(s), if any. The trial Court is however directed to expedite the matters and decide the same in accordance with law. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
